messages.content: Output only space-separated integers, nothing else.

You are a time-series forecaster. Below is a univariate sequence of 14 integers in [0, 99]. Continue the sequence with exactly 6 more integers, separated by single spaces, no other text.

Sequence: 0 18 30 48 69 92 99 78 83 95 95 46 30 27
